productDisplayName: Peter England Men Party Blue Jeans
description: Style Note Look cool and casual in these jeans from peter england. The washed look gives you an individual style, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with tees and canvas shoes. Product Details Blue jeans with two insert pockets on the front with an insert pocket in the right side pocket, has two patch pockets at the back, brand badge appliqued on the waistband at the back, comfortable waistband with loops and a button and zipper closure on the front Material and Care 100% cotton Wash separately using mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Size and Fit Fitted seat low waist slim leg The model (height 6' and waist 32&rdquo ) is wearing a size 32
